title: helichrysum odoratissimum
intro: Helichrysum odoratissimum, also known as the yellow salsify or curry plant, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of helichrysum odoratissimum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Helichrysum odoratissimum can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy and herbal medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
